text:
Market today: Headlines point to continued AI momentum in tech and chips (Amazon, Micron). This is generally positive for your concentrated book, but the leveraged nature of some holdings amplifies volatility.

Your holdings: SOXL (-28.7%) is a major concern due to its deep drawdown and leveraged decay. SPAL (-9.58%), another leveraged ETF, is new and already showing losses. QQQI (-1.86%) is flagged to trim. Remember margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on SMH, which the scanner flags as a BUY setup, and Amazon, given its AI push.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage your leveraged losers while staying alert for opportunities in core tech/chips.
plays: Your Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X (SOXL) is down -28.7% and flagged SELL. Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position to reduce exposure to accelerated decay and market volatility.
SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is already down -9.58% and moves fast. Review your stop at 21.38 and consider if this position aligns with your risk tolerance.

The scanner shows a BUY setup for SMH (entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88). This could be an opportunity to average down if you believe in the long-term thesis, given your existing position is down -6.93%.
